roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:70 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  18  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:VIOLATION # 2 - ABSCONDING IS DISMISSED,/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM, CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 65 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HEWILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILLBEAVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON TUESDAY, APRIL 1, 2014,  THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMEDBYMICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASUREASDEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 65 DAYS OF TREATMENT,  IF CLIENT FAILS TO COMPLETE HIS 65 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT WITHOUT A LAWFUL JUSTIFICATION, HE WILL BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY ON THIS PETITION TO SERVEHIS JAIL SENTENCE,  IN ADDITION, CLIENT MAY BE SUBJECT TO A NEW PETITION BASED UPON A VIOLATIONOF A COURT ORDER,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:03-05-14,/X:THE COURT FINDS GOODCAUSE AND REINSTATES PAROLE ON 03-05-14 WITHOUT ANYTIME LOSS, /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
